use_cases: Toggle settings or preferences in application interfaces
Enable or disable features in SaaS dashboards
Theme toggles for light/dark mode switches
Filter toggles in e-commerce product listings
ai_summary: A smooth animated toggle switch component built with React and Framer Motion featuring spring-based physics for satisfying tactile feedback. The switch toggles between dark and light states with a subtle yellow glow effect when activated, and includes proper ARIA attributes for accessibility. Ideal for settings panels, feature toggles, and form inputs requiring boolean state management.
